productName: BFF Flavored Live Resin Vape Cart - WYD - Watermelon Yuzu Dragon fruit - 1g - (H) - DOH
description: A hybrid vape cartridge filled with Watermelon Yuzu Dragon fruit oil — smooth, flavorful vapor in a discreet, no-torch, push-button format that goes wherever you go. Flavor on the go, a sweet, refreshing watermelon flavor, leading into a balanced head-and-body experience.
